task_completion.description: Agent searches for or navigates to the coordinates for Point Nemo or Ducie Island.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the search bar of a GIS application (e.g., Google Earth, Marble) populated with coordinates like '48 52.6 S 123 23.6 W' or the map centered on the South Pacific Ocean.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a placemark at Point Nemo with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a map pin at approximately 48°52'S, 123°23'W labeled 'Point Nemo - Oceanic Pole of Inaccessibility'.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a placemark at Ducie Island with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a map pin at approximately 24°40'S, 124°47'W labeled 'Ducie Island - Nearest Land to Point Nemo'.

task_completion.description: Agent uses a ruler or measurement tool to draw a line connecting the two placemarks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a visible line or path connecting the Point Nemo placemark and the Ducie Island placemark using the application's measurement tool.

task_completion.description: The measurement tool displays the correct distance between the points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the measurement dialog or readout displaying a distance of approximately 2,688 km (values between 2,680 km and 2,700 km are acceptable).

task_completion.description: Agent saves the placemarks and measurement to the specified KML file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a 'Save As' dialog or file manager showing the filename 'point_nemo_isolation.kml' being saved to or located in '/home/ga/Documents/'.

integrity.description: Agent must not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the KML file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that there are no screenshots of the terminal being used to write KML code (e.g., using `echo`, `cat`, or python scripts to create the file).

integrity.description: Agent must interact with a GIS application GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that screenshots show the interface of a mapping application (like Google Earth Pro or Marble) with visible map rendering, not just a text editor or file explorer.

integrity.description: Distance must be measured using the application's tool, not calculated externally.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the distance readout appears within the application's native measurement window/overlay, not typed into a description field or text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Point Nemo is located at 48°52.6'S, 123°23.6'W (-48.8767, -123.3933). Ducie Island is located at 24°40'S, 124°47'W (-24.66917, -124.78639). The expected distance between them is approximately 2,688 km.
